name: grill-me
description: Interview the user relentlessly to lock a plan, then have codex adversarially review it round by round until it approves or you sign off. One question at a time, each with a recommended answer, settles the decision tree into PLAN.md; codex (an external model, read-only, over MCP) then attacks the plan across rounds while Claude arbitrates revisions, appending the exchange to PLAN-REVIEW-LOG.md. No code is written until you sign off. Requires the codex CLI.
